roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PHC/INTC/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS INTO AN INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:PART OF THE NEGOTIATED INFORMAL DIVERSION IS DEFENDANT WILL NOT ENTER PLEA FOR 9 MONTHS, MUST REMAIN EMPLOYED (WITHIN HIS CONTROL), ABIDE BY PREVIOUSLY FILED STAY AWAY ORDER, AND REPORT TO ACM 1X A WEEK BY PHONE/RX/X:THE COURT DELETES THE WEEKLY LATINO GROUP MEETINGS/X:IF DEFENDANT IS SUCCESSFUL IN COMPLETING THESE TERMS AND DOES NOT PICK UP ANY NEW ARREST LEADING TO NEW CHARGES,PEOPLE WILL DISMISS CASE/PROGPTD:06-02-22/CONTD: 06-02-22 FOR PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/CONTD: 12-08-22 FOR PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT & POTENTIAL DISMISSAL/DOP/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET PRELIMINARY OR DISPOSITION/INTC/CONTD: 01-13-22 PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DOP/CONTD: 01-20-22 PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT: CONFL CNSL APPTD/X: THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICEDECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: SCOTT SUGARMAN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 10-12-21 (60TH)/987,2/ACM/WS/SAORD/SA2: 200 BLOCK OF HYDE STREET,SF/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE,09-09-21, D9/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/X: FUTURE DATE IS CHANGED TO PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/FAVRPT/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE,TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DOP/
